pages.title: Frappe les murs
pages.text: $(bold)Mains nues :$()$(br)Poussiere, batons, planches, fragments$(br2)$(bold)Pioche Fragmentee :$()$(br)Poussiere, fragments, silex, argile

pages.title: Pioche Renforcee
pages.text: $(bold)Drops :$()$(br)Grits (fer, cuivre, etain, nickel)$(br)Charbon, redstone$(br)Compose A (rare)$(br)Poussiere de mur
